mnemonics: Non-classical: Fuzzy and LSTM have FISH
keyPoints: Classical models use term frequencies and inverse document frequencies (TF-IDF) to calculate relevance
Non-classical models like Fuzzy and LSTM models use natural language processing (NLP) techniques to calculate relevance
The Custer model is a type of classical model that uses a combination of TF-IDF and other techniques to calculate relevance
Major issues in information retrieval include the problem of noise, the need for personalized recommendations, and the challenge of handling large volumes of data
